headline: MiniMed's Smallest App-Controlled Insulin Pump is Now Available in the U.S.
summary: MiniMed (Nasdaq: MMED), today announced its first commercial launch of the MiniMed Flex™ system in the United States — its first app-controlled pump and the company's smallest insulin pump yet. The system launches with Simplera Sync™ sensor, a disposable, all-in-one sensor with easy two-step insertion. The launch with the Instinct sensor, made by Abbott, will follow later this summer.*
